hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0 && REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && echo "$REPO_ROOT" | grep -q 'ha_ai_addon' || exit 0 && PROD_FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- 'lifeemotions_ai_addon/' | grep -v '\.md$') && [ -z "$PROD_FILES" ] && exit 0; if ! git diff --cached -- lifeemotions_ai_addon/config.yaml | grep -q '^+version:'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: Production files changed under lifeemotions_ai_addon/ but version in config.yaml was not bumped. Bump the version first (see CLAUDE.md)."}'; fi
